finding: Enrichment of this contact requires ~2,740 credits; org balance was ~849-1,007. Reducing requested fields (phone+signals -> email only) barely changed the required cost (2740 -> 2736), so cost is driven by identifier RESOLUTION, not the field set. The 402 was returned synchronously BEFORE any deduction (matches documented behavior: '402 means insufficient credits and no credits are deducted'). This is the budget-control behavior the agent-interface-contract argues for: typed error + exact required/available numbers + no silent overspend, so an agent can stop gracefully.
